component_identification.content: Base box includes: double-sided board, 180+ cards (starting decks, dungeon deck, reserve cards), tokens for artifacts/monkey idols/keys/backpacks/crowns/secrets, 24 cubes per player color plus black dragon cubes, 4 player pawns, dragon marker, market board/items, and rulebook.

core_game_loop.content: On your turn, play all cards in hand to generate Skill, Swords, Boots, and Clank. Spend Skill to buy cards, Boots to move through dungeon, and Swords to defeat monsters. Any Clank generated is added to the Clank area and may be pulled during dragon attacks. Goal is to grab an artifact and escape for the best score.

detailed_rules.content: Movement through tunnels may require Boots, keys, or fight values for monster-guarded paths. You can only pick up one major artifact and must return to the top and ideally escape to score full points. Dungeon Row refills from deck; some cards trigger immediate dragon attacks. Black cubes in the dragon bag are neutral misses, while colored cubes deal damage to matching players when drawn. Health loss can knock players out; knockout in depths is much worse for scoring than in upper areas. Certain cards have companion/synergy icons and trashing effects for deck thinning. Market items (key/backpack/crown) are limited and can unlock routes or carry extra artifacts. Endgame starts when one player escapes or dragon rage reaches maximum; remaining players get limited turns before final attacks resolve.

scoring_and_endgame.content: Score artifact value, rescued tokens, cards/monsters with VP, gold (1 VP each), and major secrets/crowns/idols as applicable. Players who fail to escape (especially from deep) may lose artifact points per rules. Highest total wins; tie-breaker farthest progress toward escape, then most gold.

beginner_strategy.content: 1) Buy movement early or you’ll stall in choke points. 2) Control Clank generation; noisy decks can implode under repeated dragon attacks. 3) Plan your route before committing to deep artifacts—tempo to exit matters as much as value. 4) A little deck-thinning goes a long way. 5) Watch opponents’ health/rage to time your escape and pressure trailing players.

metadata.notes: Check 4 failed: total_token_count is 412; must be 800-3000 (hard reject if <800 or >5000)
